Inline comments:
In `@apps/docs/src/content/docs/component-library/hx-nav.mdx`:
- Around line 176-185: The docs currently prescribe a fixed
aria-controls="nav-list" which can collide between multiple hx-nav instances;
update the hx-nav documentation to remove the hard-coded id and instead describe
that the mobile toggle button sets aria-controls to the list element's
generated/instance-specific id (i.e., the component should generate a unique id
for the nav list and the docs should explain the generic relationship: "toggle
button's aria-controls points to this instance's list id"), and replace any
literal references to id="nav-list" with this generic guidance mentioning
aria-controls, the mobile toggle button, and the nav list relationship.
- Around line 78-89: The standalone examples render an unupgraded <hx-nav>
because they don’t show how to register the custom element; update the
snippet(s) to include a minimal registration step (e.g., a short note and a
single script/import that loads the component bundle or calls the library’s
registration function) and apply the same change to the repeated example at
lines ~240-253; reference the <hx-nav> element and the library’s public
registration entry (the component bundle or function name used to
define/customElements.define the element) so users copying the HTML will get an
upgraded, working custom element.
- Around line 214-229: The Drupal behavior example uses global APIs
(Drupal.behaviors.helixNav, drupalSettings, once, Drupal.ajax) but the docs'
.libraries.yml entry for the Helix bundle does not declare the required core
dependencies, so the snippet isn't copy/paste-safe; fix by updating the Helix
bundle in the .libraries.yml to include the Drupal core libraries that provide
